esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-cockroachdb.otel-default*
| WHERE service.name == "cockroachdb"
  AND sys_cpu_combined_percent_normalized IS NOT NULL
  AND sys_cpu_combined_percent_normalized > 0.8
// Node-level: CockroachDB process CPU; > 0.8 indicates overload
| WHERE attributes.node_id IS NOT NULL AND attributes.store IS NULL
| STATS cpu_pct = ROUND(MAX(sys_cpu_combined_percent_normalized) * 100.0, 1) BY attributes.node_id, host.name
| SORT cpu_pct DESC
